subject: An ornate metal amulet pendant strung on a knotted leather cord, displayed against a dim stone-walled chamber.
description: A symmetrical talisman crafted from tarnished silver or steel hangs at the center of the frame, suspended from a braided dark cord. The amulet has a stylized winged or fanned upper crest and a faceted central gem or boss, flanked by curling arms that taper outward. The background is a hazy, low-lit interior of pale stone — likely a vault, shrine niche, or ruined chamber — with soft cool light grading from muted teal-gray at the edges into warmer ochre near the pendant, giving the relic a quiet, museum-piece aura. No figures, no action; the object itself is the subject.
foreground: Ornate winged amulet on a knotted cord, centered and forward-facing.
background: Soft-focus stone chamber interior with diffuse cool light.
